name: Yankee Maple Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs and sugar until smooth.
3. Add milk and maple syrup to the egg mixture and whisk well.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir in 3 tablespoons of melted butter.
5. Fold the mixture until just combined.
6. Fill muffin cups (approximately one dozen) with the batter.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 350°F.
8. Brush the tops of the muffins with the remaining melted butter before serving.
